name: Stingers Golf Club
address: 900 E Pecos Rd Ste 1, Chandler, AZ 85225
about: Stingers Golf Club is a premium indoor golf venue located in Chandler, Arizona. The facility offers a modern climate-controlled environment with advanced golf simulators, providing a year-round golfing experience. It is designed for both casual golfers looking to socialize and serious golfers seeking a realistic practice environment. The venue features multiple revenue streams, including simulator time, food and beverage service, corporate events, leagues, and memberships, making it a comprehensive entertainment destination.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with realistic ground movement and world-class course play
Premium indoor experience perfect for beating the Arizona heat
Unbelievable swing feedback and high-quality booth technology
Multiple revenue streams ensure a full-featured entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full food and beverage service available with a kitchen and food ordering options.
Full bar service with cocktails, wine, and beer available.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with realistic ground movement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full food and beverage menu for in-house service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary, but with state-of-the-art simulators, it generally takes around 2-3 hours depending on your group size.

faq.question: Is Stingers Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and is a kid-friendly environment for both golfing and dining experiences.
